subject: Season objectives for {team}
body:
The board has outlined the expectations for {team} this season.

We expect you to build a competitive squad, implement a solid tactical system, and ensure the club's financial stability. Review your squad, set your training priorities, and prepare for the challenges ahead.

We will be watching your progress closely.

es.subject: Objetivos de temporada para {team}
es.body:
El consejo ha definido las expectativas para {team} esta temporada.

Esperamos que construyas una plantilla competitiva, implementes un sistema táctico sólido y garantices la estabilidad financiera del club. Revisa tu plantilla, establece tus prioridades y prepárate para los desafíos que vienen.

Seguiremos tu progreso de cerca.
